title: Tracing and logging setup
description: Configure tracing + tracing-subscriber for structured logging. Log level controlled by RUST_LOG env var. INFO level: activity type + target + HTTP status. Full request/response bodies only at TRACE. Never log tokens, never log full activity bodies at INFO. Include request ID in log spans.
design: tracing-subscriber with EnvFilter from RUST_LOG. Use #[tracing::instrument] on handler functions. Tower TraceLayer for HTTP request logging. Span fields: request_id (uuid), method, path, status.
acceptance_criteria: Server logs incoming requests with method, path, status, and latency at INFO; RUST_LOG=trace shows full details; tokens are never visible in any log output; startup logs include listen address and domain
